3. $j=1$: $T=0100$. Cost: $s[0]=0$ (0) + $s[1]=1$ (0) + $s[2]=1 \to 0$ (1) + $s[3]=0$ (0). Total 1. MinCost = 1.
$j=2$: $T=0010$. Cost: $s[0]=0$ (0) + $s[1]=1 \to 0$ (1) + $s[2]=1$ (0) + $s[3]=0$ (0). Total 1. MinCost = 1.
4. $T=0001$. $j=3$. Cost: $\sum_{i=0}^2 [s[i]=1] + [s[3]=0] = P1[3] + 1 = 2 + 1 = 3$.
